Flags.ShardingScheme: Top-level only: L1=id[0:2], L2=id[0:4] padded. Inside cyborg: {YYYY}/{YYYY-MM-DD}.jsonl

Policies.Safety: append-only per-day JSONL, top-level 2-level shard, atomic Profile.json + per-cyborg Dashboard.md + repo Dashboard.md + _index.json updates, never edit history

BranchModel.Note: WebOS excluded: only platform owner works on it.

Policies.Safety: delegate-only, isolated child failures, no auto-clone, no CSV auto-resume, per-cyborg branch, dynamic git account (no hardcoded creds)

DescriptionExamples: Initial branch setup on new machine

Policies.Safety: create-only branches, never delete/rename/force, per-repo isolated, dirty-tree stash+restore, identity-gated (Target must equal manifest.Developer.CyborgID unless admin-override)
read-only for JSONL history, overwrite-only for derived Dashboard.md + _index counters

BranchModel.Note: Outbound mirror of Check-in. Cyborg/.github/WebOS never pushed from a cyborg workstation.

Policies.Safety: delegate-only, isolated child failures, no force-push, no auto-commit, no mirror, per-cyborg branch, dynamic git account
